name: @powerhousedao/ph-clint-cli-root
description: Root of the ph-clint-cli project. Split layout: ph-clint-cli (the ph-clint CLI side) + ph-clint-app (the Powerhouse reactor-package side). No pnpm workspace — each sub-project installs independently.

scripts.install: cd ph-clint-app && pnpm install && cd ../ph-clint-cli && pnpm install
scripts.build: cd ph-clint-app && pnpm build && cd ../ph-clint-cli && pnpm build
scripts.test: cd ph-clint-app && pnpm test && cd ../ph-clint-cli && pnpm test
